main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'telescoping cabeza etapa 1 + golpe ariete + rearranque HP pump + rampa VFD reprogramada' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Parar bastidor + verificar/restaurar rampa VFD 90s + probing test elemento por elemento — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide tiempo rampa VFD HP pump — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: VFD 90s exacta y sin pico → switch.
